case_title: JESUS CHAVEZ VS. FRANCISCO NAVARRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OIL CHANGERS 614

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, JESUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OIL CHANGERS 614 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST FRANCISCO NAVARRO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
